artifacts.reason: The finalized testnet-307 reveal-to-publication receipt remains in the private campaign ledger; repository-retained bytes are unavailable.

claims.statement: The implementation replaces production command-based grading with finalized ordered intake, hardened fetch, immutable delta publication, copy reconciliation, and a typed causal-qualification call boundary.
The retained GitHub receipt records successful evidence and CodeQL checks for the implementation head.
A digest-retained testnet-307 receipt binds one finalized canonical reveal to a rehashed immutable three-file publication that reopened after restart without refetch.
The production CLI remains explicitly intake-only; this architectural unit creates no settlement, weight, or chain-to-GPU qualification authority.

exit_criteria.statement: Arrival priority binds finalized block hash and reveal-event order, persists before transport, and fails closed on missing or ambiguous cross-miner ordering evidence.
Private fetch bytes are normalized and independently republished into a content-addressed read-only worker product before qualification use.
The digest-retained live testnet run reached finalized intake, immutable publication, and restart reopen with settlement and weights disabled.
The exact final head was reported to pass 368 focused RTX-container tests; the raw log is unavailable.
The repository-retained GitHub receipt binds successful evidence checks to the implementation head.
